description: Full campaign management inside use60 — create, launch, edit, pause, and monitor LinkedIn ad campaigns

extractedRequirements: Connect LinkedIn ad accounts with rw_ads permission
Campaign group CRUD with budgets and schedules
Campaign creation wizard (objective, format, targeting, budget, schedule)
Basic creative creation (single image sponsored content)
Campaign status management (draft, active, paused, archived)
Inline performance metrics on campaign views
extractedConstraints: EU political ad compliance for EU-targeted campaigns
LinkedIn is source of truth for drift resolution

team.tierReason: 6 complexity score: 9 stories, 4 schema tables, LinkedIn API, cross-feature deps, budget security

stories.title: Database migration: campaign management tables
acceptance: linkedin_managed_campaigns table with all PRD columns + RLS
linkedin_managed_creatives table with all PRD columns + RLS
linkedin_managed_lead_forms table with all PRD columns + RLS
linkedin_campaign_approvals table with all PRD columns + RLS
All policies use org_id scoping via organization_memberships
Service role bypass policies on all tables
Indexes on org_id, campaign_id, status columns

stories.title: Edge function: linkedin-campaign-manager (CRUD router)
acceptance: Actions: list_campaigns, get_campaign, create_campaign, update_campaign, update_status
Actions: list_groups, create_group, update_group
Actions: list_creatives, create_creative, update_creative
All mutations use versionTag for optimistic concurrency
Creates entities on LinkedIn via Advertising API then stores locally
Validates against LinkedIn limits before API submission
Uses getCorsHeaders(req) from _shared/corsHelper.ts
Auth via edgeAuth.ts pattern with org role validation

stories.title: Edge function: linkedin-campaign-sync (bidirectional sync worker)
acceptance: Actions: sync (manual for specific org), sync_all (cron for all connected orgs)
Fetches campaigns, campaign groups, and creatives from LinkedIn API
Upserts local state to match LinkedIn (LinkedIn is source of truth)
Detects drift: flags campaigns modified externally since last sync
Tracks sync runs in linkedin_analytics_sync_runs (reuse existing table)
Follows linkedin-analytics-sync patterns: date chunking, retry, batch upsert

stories.title: Edge function: linkedin-campaign-approval (approval handler)
acceptance: Actions: request_approval, approve, reject, list_pending
Budget-impacting actions (activate, increase budget) require approval by default
Auto-approve actions: create draft, pause, create creative
Stores approval records with action_type, requested_by, details
On approve: executes the pending action via linkedin-campaign-manager
Integrates with Slack for approval notifications

stories.title: Service layer: linkedinAdManagerService.ts
acceptance: Wraps all linkedin-campaign-manager edge function actions
Wraps linkedin-campaign-sync actions
Wraps linkedin-campaign-approval actions
Uses supabase.functions.invoke() pattern from adLibraryService.ts
Exports TypeScript interfaces for all response types
Error handling with clear user-facing messages

stories.title: Hook: useLinkedInAdManager.ts
acceptance: Manages campaign list, groups, creatives, and approval state
ready check: isAuthenticated && user && activeOrgId && !authLoading
useRef(initialLoadDone) to prevent duplicate loads
Loading states per data type (campaigns, groups, creatives)
toast.error() for all failures
Returns action methods: createCampaign, updateStatus, syncCampaigns, etc.

stories.title: UI: Campaign list page with status management
acceptance: Replace CampaignsPage stub with full campaign management page
Tabs: Campaigns, Campaign Groups, Approvals
Campaign table: name, status badge, format, budget, spend, impressions, clicks, CTR
Sorting on all metric columns
Status filter (draft, active, paused, archived)
Search by campaign name
Row click opens detail Sheet panel
Quick actions: pause, resume, archive per campaign
Sync button to trigger manual sync
Uses Lucide icons only, no emoji

stories.title: UI: Campaign detail Sheet panel
acceptance: SheetContent with !top-16 !h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] positioning
Campaign header: name, status badge, format, objective
Budget section: daily/total budget, spend to date, pacing
Targeting summary: job titles, industries, geos, seniority
Schedule: start/end dates or continuous indicator
Creatives list: thumbnails with headline, status, metrics
Performance inline: impressions, clicks, spend, leads, CTR, CPC from analytics
Action buttons: edit, pause/resume, archive, view on LinkedIn

stories.title: UI: Campaign creation wizard (5-step)
acceptance: Dialog-based wizard following HubSpotImportWizard pattern
Step 1: Objective — select from 6 objectives with descriptions
Step 2: Format — select from supported formats (filtered by objective), format immutability warning
Step 3: Targeting — job title, function, seniority, company, industry, geography builders
Step 4: Budget & Bid — daily/lifetime budget, bid strategy (manual CPC/CPM, target cost, cost cap), schedule dates
Step 5: Review — full summary of all selections with edit links per section
Creates campaign in DRAFT status on submit
Validation at each step before advancing
Back/Next/Create navigation
EU political ad compliance notice when EU regions selected in targeting

stories.title: UI: Creative creation form
acceptance: Dialog form for creating single image sponsored content creative
Fields: headline, body text, CTA, destination URL, image upload
Character count validation per LinkedIn limits
Preview card showing how creative will appear
Attaches to selected campaign
Limit warning when approaching 15 active creatives per campaign
Creates as direct sponsored content (not on company page)

stories.title: UI: Campaign group management
acceptance: Campaign Groups tab on campaigns page
Table listing groups: name, status, budget, campaign count, total spend
Create group dialog: name, budget (daily/lifetime), schedule, status
Edit group inline or via dialog
Archive group action
Validation: max 2000 campaigns per non-default group

stories.title: UI: Approval queue and confirmation flow
acceptance: Approvals tab on campaigns page showing pending approvals
Each approval card: action type, campaign name, requested by, details, timestamp
Approve/Reject buttons with confirmation dialog
Confirmation modal for budget-impacting actions (activate campaign, increase budget)
Badge count on Approvals tab for pending items
Toast feedback on approve/reject

stories.title: Route registration and navigation
acceptance: Update /campaigns route to use new CampaignsPage (already mapped)
Add navigation entry in sidebar under appropriate section
Page has Helmet meta title
Lazy loading via lazyPages.tsx (already configured)
